close_reason: Style: inline format args vs named — marginal
description:
Location: secretx-pkcs11/src/lib.rs:180-184.

Current code:
    source: format!(
        "unsupported EC curve (CKA_EC_PARAMS = {:02x?}); only P-256 is supported",
        params
    )
    .into(),

clippy::uninlined_format_args (in pedantic) suggests:
    source: format!(
        "unsupported EC curve (CKA_EC_PARAMS = {params:02x?}); only P-256 is supported",
    )
    .into(),

Modern Rust (1.58+) supports inline format-arg captures. The crate already uses this style elsewhere — line 75-77, 112-114, 280, 349, 445, 509, 516, 558, 718, 738. Line 180-184 is the lone holdout.

Consistency-only fix; no functional change. Mark as opinion if the team doesn't already enforce inline-args via clippy lint.
title: Inline format args at line 180 for consistency with rest of file
